review_text: This stout has a rich, roasted flavor with notes of coffee and dark chocolate. A truly exceptional brew!
A fantastic IPA with a strong citrus aroma and a balanced bitterness. Very refreshing.
A crisp and clean lager, perfect for a sunny afternoon. Nothing too adventurous, but consistently good.
Absolutely love the tartness and fruitiness of this sour ale. Complex and incredibly well-made.
Decent pilsner, but a bit too light for my taste. Lacks the depth I usually look for in this style.
